meta.description: SDXL + OpenPose + Canny ControlNets → ComfyUI expected output summary

critical_enforcements: R11: Two ControlNetLoader nodes (one for OpenPose, one for Canny)
R11: Two ControlNetApplyAdvanced nodes chained SERIALLY (NOT parallel)
CN1 (OpenPose) output conditioning → CN2 (Canny) input conditioning
Each ControlNetApplyAdvanced receives its own ControlNetLoader output
Each ControlNet has its own input image and preprocessor
expected_workflow_summary.chain_verification: CheckpointLoaderSimple.MODEL → KSampler.model (unchanged by CNs, CNs only affect conditioning)
